misc: Known for bomb drives despite his advanced age.
Finally made his first hole-in-one on May 24th, 2025, after 20 years of trying.
biography: Harri, affectionately known as "the doctor" within golfing circles, is a familiar face at the Hector Trophée. Representing Hattula Golf, Harri is set to make his seventh appearance at the tournament in 2026. He has participated in 6 previous editions.

Despite his age, Harri is renowned for his ability to bomb drives off the tee, consistently outperforming players many years his junior. His competitive spirit and dedication to the game have earned him the respect of peers and fans alike.

Harri has tasted victory at the Hector Trophée on two occasions, proving his mettle in the pairs format. Although the Victor Trophy has eluded him thus far, he remains a formidable individual competitor.

In a moment of personal triumph, Harri finally achieved his first hole-in-one on May 24th, 2025, after two decades of relentless pursuit. This milestone serves as a testament to his unwavering passion for golf and his commitment to improvement.
